creator: cem@freebsd.org
text:
FYI, I dropped some changes.  Especially most of the additions of 'the,' which I felt were not helpful.  But also at least one attempt to merge two sentences into one longer one — which ended up suffering from excessive commas.  The style aimed for in man pages is accessible.  Short sentences that don't try to do too much are preferred.

For future doc changes I suggest using phabricator instead of bugzilla, because the doc team should be automatically included on manual page reviews and they are very good at providing feedback.  Also, some back and forth is usually necessary as part of review.
